meaning: ly//adv.相互依赖adj.相互依赖的,坏,相互依存地
examples: We live in an increasingly interdependent world.
The world is becoming increasingly interdependent.
Also, many species are interdependent, intimately connected to one another.
We live in a world that has rapidly gone from connected to interconnected to interdependent.
Everything is now personal as the world is now not just interdependent, it is morally interdependent.
